arguments.argument: draw_set_font(fnt_HUDnum) draw_set_alpha(1) draw_set_halign(fa_center) draw_set_color(numColor) if room=rNGC_RB_A { draw_text(886,156,"1") draw_text(886,412,"2") draw_text(886,668,"3") } else if room=rNGC_RB_B { draw_text(166,108,"1") draw_text(166,460,"2") draw_text(166,812,"3") draw_text(166,1164,"4") draw_text(166,1516,"5") draw_text(166,1868,"6") draw_text(166,2268,"7") } else if room=rNGC_RB_C { draw_text(454,44,"1") draw_text(454,300,"2") draw_text(454,556,"3") } else if room=rNGC_RB_D { draw_text(358,76,"1") draw_text(358,940,"2") }
